A Quiet Place (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $188,024,361Details
International Box Office $146,852,309
Worldwide Box Office $334,876,670
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,273,278
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $12,684,236
Total $24,957,514
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A family of four must navigate their lives in silence after mysterious creatures that hunt by sound threaten their survival. If they hear you, they hunt you.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,203,562 (26.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 19.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,508 opening theaters/3,808 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $246,846,471

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 6th, 2018 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: April 4th, 2018 (Wide) (South Korea)
April 5th, 2018 (Wide), released as A Quiet Place - Un Posto Tranquillo (Italy)
April 6th, 2018 (Wide), released as Tylos zona (Lithuania)
April 6th, 2018 (Wide) (Indonesia)
April 6th, 2018 (Wide), released as ТИХОЕ МЕСТО (превью) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: July 10th, 2018 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror and some bloody images.
(Rating bulletin 2519 (Cert #51449), 3/21/2018)
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: A Quiet Place
Cast, crew, or production detail: Directing Yourself, Family Affair, Intertitle, Limited Dialogue, Motion Capture Performance, Prologue, Relatives Playing Relatives, Screenplay Written By the Star
Geographical setting: New York
Plot point: Deaf, Death of a Son or Daughter, Father and Daughter, Sign Language
Social setting: Alien Invasion, Life on a Farm
Subgenre: Isolation Horror
Time period setting: 2020s, Near Future
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Platinum Dunes, Sunday Night
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Sign Language
